description: Gift your feet the ultimate in casual comfort with these puma surf flip flops. With a cushioned footbed and comfortable straps, it's the best in comfort and style.UpperThong styled soft, cushioned PU straps with a twill toe separator to lock the foot in placeTwill fabric tape on the upper of the straps for styleHevaily cushioned PU footbed for flexible movement and all-day comfortOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with suction grooves for enhanced grip and tractionErgonomically curved for ease of movementshoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
